CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2021 Continued To Dec-15-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order To Appoint An Arbitrator
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Atty. Richard A. Hoyer, Esq. of for the Plaintiffs;
Atty. Ross Vartain, Esq. of , for the Defendant University of San Francisco.

DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Petition For Order To Appoint An Arbitrator.

The matter is called. DISCUSSIONS are held.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2021 Continued To Aug-11-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition For Order To Arbitrate And Stay Of Action Pending Contractual Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-14-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance is made in this matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Petition For Order To Arbitrate And Stay Of Action Pending Contractual Arbitration is GRANTED per plaintiff's statement of non-opposition. If the parties are unable to agree upon an arbitrator, they may file a petition under Code of Civil Procedure section 1281.6.

Written order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: proceedings not reported.
